message:
🌱 Add kube-vip: Consistent DHCP renew failure analysis mission (#949)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kube-vip-871-consistent-dhcp-renew-failure-analysis",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kube-vip: Consistent DHCP renew failure analysis",
+    "description": "Consistent DHCP renew failure analysis. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kube-vip deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kube-vip version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -A | grep kube-vip
kubectl get daemonset -n kube-system kube-vip-ds 2>/dev/null || echo "May be running as a static pod"
```
This feature requires a working kube-vip installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-vip configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-vip configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -A | grep kube-vip
kubectl get configmap -n kube-system kube-vip 2>/dev/null
```
Potentially related issues: #572, #580

> ### **TL;DR** 
> **In certain network setups, DHCP renewals performed by `kube-vip` generally fail.** Further implementation issues result in ARP announcements of an IP for which a lease is no longer held."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Consistent DHCP renew failure analysis",
+        "description": "When using DHCP for LB services, the resulting IP was assigned to the `serviceInterface` while most (not all) DHCP communication was done through a per-service `macvlan` interface that is created on demand.

This has been the cause of DHCP lease renewal failures for some users, as the response
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
    name: kube-vip
  name: kube-vip
  namespace: kube-vip
spec:
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
    spec:
      containers:
      - args:
        - manager
        env:
        - name: svc_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_arp
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_leaderelection
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_serv
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -A | grep kube-vip
kubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Consistent DHCP renew failure analysis" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When using DHCP for LB services, the resulting IP was assigned to the `serviceInterface` while most (not all) DHCP communication was done through a per-service `macvlan` interface that is created on demand.

This has been the cause of DHCP lease renewal failures for some users, as the response packets from the server never reached kube-vip. For more details, see issue #871.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
    name: kube-vip
  name: kube-vip
  namespace: kube-vip
spec:
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: kube-vip
    spec:
      containers:
      - args:
        - manager
        env:
        - name: svc_enable
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_arp
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_leaderelection
          value: "true"
        - name: vip_servicesinterface
          value: eth0
        - name: svc_election
          value: "true"
        - name: cp_namespace
          value: kube-vip
        - name: enable_node_labeling
          value: "t"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kube-vip",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kube-vip"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Role",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip/issues/871",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip/pull/897"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kube-vip installed as a static pod or DaemonSet."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:38:56.418Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
